name: birta-writer
description: Birta Writer: a WYSIWYG Markdown editor for VS Code with live table editing

birta.fontFamilySans.default: system-ui, -apple-system, "Segoe UI", Roboto, "Helvetica Neue", Arial, "Noto Sans", sans-serif

birta.fontFamilySerif.default: "Iowan Old Style", "Palatino", Charter, ui-serif, Georgia, serif

birta.fontFamilyMono.default: ui-monospace, "Cascadia Code", "Source Code Pro", Menlo, Consolas, "DejaVu Sans Mono", monospace

birta.toolbar.visible.description: Show the toolbar. When off, a small tab at the top edge (or the Toggle Toolbar command) brings it back.

birta.toolbar.items.format.description: Text level menu (paragraph, headings): pick a toolbar zone or hide it.

birta.toolbar.items.clearFormatting.description: Clear formatting button: pick a toolbar zone or hide it.

birta.toolbar.items.fontPreset.description: Font picker: pick a toolbar zone or hide it.

birta.toolbar.items.bold.description: Bold button: pick a toolbar zone or hide it.

birta.toolbar.items.italic.description: Italic button: pick a toolbar zone or hide it.

birta.toolbar.items.strikethrough.description: Strikethrough button: pick a toolbar zone or hide it.

birta.toolbar.items.highlight.description: Highlight (==mark==) button: pick a toolbar zone or hide it.

birta.toolbar.items.inlineCode.description: Inline code button: pick a toolbar zone or hide it.

birta.toolbar.items.link.description: Insert/edit link button: pick a toolbar zone or hide it.

birta.toolbar.items.image.description: Insert image button: pick a toolbar zone or hide it.

birta.toolbar.items.table.description: Insert table button: pick a toolbar zone or hide it.

birta.toolbar.items.footnote.description: Insert footnote button: pick a toolbar zone or hide it.

birta.toolbar.items.math.description: Inline math button: pick a toolbar zone or hide it.

birta.toolbar.items.listMenu.description: Lists dropdown (bullet / ordered / task): pick a toolbar zone or hide it.

birta.toolbar.items.quote.description: Quote dropdown (plain blockquote plus the GitHub callout types: Note, Tip, Important, Warning, Caution): pick a toolbar zone or hide it.

birta.toolbar.items.codeBlock.description: Code block button: pick a toolbar zone or hide it.

birta.toolbar.items.horizontalRule.description: Horizontal rule button: pick a toolbar zone or hide it.

birta.toolbar.items.viewSource.description: Edit Raw Markdown button (switch to the plain text editor): pick a toolbar zone or hide it.

birta.toolbar.items.styleCheck.description: Checks menu (spelling, grammar, style): pick a toolbar zone or hide it.

birta.toolbar.items.find.description: Find button: pick a toolbar zone or hide it.

birta.toolbar.items.settings.description: Settings button: pick a toolbar zone or hide it.

birta.toolbar.order.markdownDescription: Left-to-right ordering of toolbar items within their zone. List item ids in the order you want; within each zone, listed items come first (in this order), then any unlisted items in the built-in order. Ids: `format`, `clearFormatting`, `fontPreset`, `bold`, `italic`, `strikethrough`, `highlight`, `inlineCode`, `link`, `image`, `table`, `footnote`, `math`, `listMenu`, `quote`, `codeBlock`, `horizontalRule`, `viewSource`, `styleCheck`, `find`, `settings`. Example: to put Clear Formatting last in a zone, list the other items in that zone before `clearFormatting`.

birta.floatingToolbar.enabled.description: Show a floating formatting palette above the current selection. For a text selection it offers inline formatting; for a whole-block (multi-block) selection it offers move, duplicate, and delete.

birta.floatingToolbar.items.format.description: Floating palette: show the text-level menu (paragraph, headings).

birta.floatingToolbar.items.bold.description: Floating palette: show the Bold button.

birta.floatingToolbar.items.italic.description: Floating palette: show the Italic button.

birta.floatingToolbar.items.strikethroug.description: Floating palette: show the Strikethrough button.

birta.floatingToolbar.items.inlineCode.description: Floating palette: show the Inline Code button.

birta.floatingToolbar.items.highlight.description: Floating palette: show the Highlight button.

birta.floatingToolbar.items.link.description: Floating palette: show the Insert/Edit Link button.

birta.floatingToolbar.items.sectionLink.description: Floating palette: show the Link to Section button (anchor link to a heading).

birta.floatingToolbar.items.clearFormatt.description: Floating palette: show the Clear Formatting button.

birta.floatingToolbar.items.math.description: Floating palette: show the Inline Math button.

scripts.test:integration: node -e "require('fs').rmSync('out',{recursive:true,force:true})" && pnpm build && tsc -p tsconfig.integration.json && node out/test/runTest.js
